prompt: 给 fastapi/fastapi 的 0.135.0 版本写一份 release notes，输出到 workspace/eval-3-library-release/with_skill/outputs/release-notes-0.135.0.md

assertions.description: Output file exists and is non-empty
Contains pip install command for fastapi 0.135.0
PR links follow correct github.com/fastapi/fastapi format
Feature descriptions avoid pure implementation language — no bullet lines beginning with 'Implemented', 'Refactored', 'Added support for' as the only description
assertions.check: fewer than 30% of feature bullet points start with 'Implemented' or 'Refactored'
